_comment: Shielded-stance VISUALS demo (#486): stage two player infantry units side by side -- the left in SHIELD WALL (formation 4, a locked shield line along its front face) and the right in TESTUDO (formation 5, an overhead shield roof over the block, the turtle) -- so the two new stance overlays are shown together at a glance. Drill mode (no opponent), so nothing routs and the units simply hold their stance for the whole clip. The camera frames both blocks; frame capture at a few ticks confirms the shield line and the roof actually render.
